name: multi_field_single_message_hinglish
notes: Hinglish variant of the multi-field-single-message behavior: name + business type + city + tenure all land in one Hinglish sentence, answering the pre-seeded business_type confirm in one shot. No later turn may re-ask any of those facts. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey --draft-type tailoring --draft-city Lucknow` then `script <tenant> multi_field_single_message_hinglish.json`.

steps.message: Hum Rihana Tailors hain, ladies aur gents ki tailoring ka kaam karte hain Lucknow mein, pichle 5 saal se
steps.note: Hinglish: name + business type + city + tenure in ONE message. Expect the reply to use/acknowledge this and move forward, not ask for any single fact.

steps.message: sab thik se note ho gaya na?
steps.note: Retention check in Hinglish: NONE of the facts (name / type / city / tenure) may be re-asked, in either language.
